value.Description: =Month-End Reconciliation: {{ $json.discrepancyCount }} discrepancies found. Issues: {{ $json.discrepancies.map(d => d.type + ': ' + d.description).join(' | ') }}

parameters.jsCode:
const data = $('Reconciliation Check').first().json; const config = $('System Config').first().json; const dateInfo = $('Check Last Business Day').first().json; // Helper to format currency const fmt = (v) => `R ${(v || 0).toFixed(2).replace(/\B(?=(\d{3})+(?!\d))/g, ',')}`; // Build AR aging rows const arBuckets = [ { label: 'Current (0-30 days)', amount: data.arSummary.current }, { label: '31-60 days', amount: data.arSummary.days_31_60 }, { label: '61-90 days', amount: data.arSummary.days_61_90 }, { label: '91-120 days', amount: data.arSummary.days_91_120 }, { label: '120+ days', amount: data.arSummary.days_120_plus }, ]; const arRows = arBuckets.map(b => `${b.label}${fmt(b.amount)}` ).join(''); // Build AP aging rows const apBuckets = [ { label: 'Current (0-30 days)', amount: data.apSummary.current }, { label: '31-60 days', amount: data.apSummary.days_31_60 }, { label: '61-90 days', amount: data.apSummary.days_61_90 }, { label: '91-120 days', amount: data.apSummary.days_91_120 }, { label: '120+ days', amount: data.apSummary.days_120_plus }, ]; const apRows = apBuckets.map(b => `${b.label}${fmt(b.amount)}` ).join(''); // Build exceptions list const discrepancies = data.discrepancies || []; const exceptionRows = discrepancies.length > 0 ? discrepancies.map(d => `${d.type}${d.description}${fmt(d.amount)}` ).join('') : 'No exceptions found'; const html = ` Month-End Management Pack

Month-End Management Pack

${dateInfo.monthName} | ${config.companyName}

Executive Summary

Total Receivables

${fmt(data.totalAR)}

Total Payables

${fmt(data.totalAP)}

Net Position

${fmt(data.netPosition)}

Cash Received

${fmt(data.totalPaymentsReceived)}

Aged Receivables

${arRows}
Aging Bucket Amount
Total (${data.invoiceCount} invoices) ${fmt(data.totalAR)}

Aged Payables

${apRows}
Aging Bucket Amount
Total (${data.billCount} bills) ${fmt(data.totalAP)}

Cash Flow Snapshot

Payments Received This Month${fmt(data.totalPaymentsReceived)}
Number of Payments${data.paymentCount}
Outstanding Receivables${fmt(data.totalAR)}
Outstanding Payables${fmt(data.totalAP)}
Net Position (AR - AP)${fmt(data.netPosition)}

Exceptions & Discrepancies (${data.discrepancyCount})

${exceptionRows}
Type Description Amount

Monthly Totals

Open Invoices${data.invoiceCount}
Open Bills${data.billCount}
Payments Received${data.paymentCount}
Audit Log Entries${data.auditLogCount}
Discrepancies Found${data.discrepancyCount}

${config.companyName} | Month-End Close Report | Generated ${dateInfo.todayDate}
This is an automated report generated by the AnyVision Media Accounting System.

`; return { json: { ...data, managementPackHtml: html, monthName: dateInfo.monthName, todayDate: dateInfo.todayDate, monthStart: dateInfo.monthStart, monthEnd: dateInfo.monthEnd, } };

value.Value: ={{ JSON.stringify({ date: $('Parse AI Summary').first().json.todayDate, month: $('Parse AI Summary').first().json.monthName, totalAR: $('Parse AI Summary').first().json.totalAR, totalAP: $('Parse AI Summary').first().json.totalAP, netPosition: $('Parse AI Summary').first().json.netPosition, discrepancies: $('Parse AI Summary').first().json.discrepancyCount }) }}

parameters.subject: =ERROR: Accounting WF-05 Month-End Close - {{ $now.format('yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm') }}
parameters.message:

Time: {{ $now.format('yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss') }}

Error: {{ $json.execution?.error?.message || 'Unknown error' }}

Node: {{ $json.execution?.lastNodeExecuted || 'Unknown' }}
